tiny_surprises.description: A single petal drifts across the grass and settles near the edge of the scene.
A seed head catches a slant of late light and glows for a quiet moment.
A small ring of mushrooms has appeared in the leaf litter near a mossy log.
An acorn rests on the path where it was not before, its cap still attached.
A faint, steady tapping carries through the trees from somewhere out of sight.
An extra ripple ring widens across the surface as the scene settles.
A lily pad has drifted a hand's width along the bank since the last visit.
A small flock crosses the corner of the scene in a loose, easy line.
A single high cloud stretches thin across the upper sky.
A small pebble has been nudged loose, the dark soil beneath it freshly exposed.
A tiny green seedling has pushed up between two sidewalk cracks near the curb.
A soft shimmer passes across the scene and fades, leaving the quiet behind.
